channel.title: azure cosmos db on Abhishek's blog
channel.description: Recent content in azure cosmos db on Abhishek's blog

item.title: Extracting Value from IoT Using Azure Cosmos DB, Azure Synapse Analytics, and Confluent Cloud
item.description: It’s possible to build seamless device-to-cloud experience with the integrations between Azure and Confluent Cloud. The example provided in this blog post showcases how the following capabilities of Azure and Confluent Cloud are leveraged:

item.title: Azure Cosmos DB: Use Cases and Trade-Offs
item.description: Azure Cosmos DB is a fully managed, elastically scalable and globally distributed database with a multi-model approach, and provides you with the ability to use document, key-value, wide-column, or graph-based data.

item.title: Build fault tolerant applications with Cassandra API for Azure Cosmos DB
item.description: Azure Cosmos DB is a resource governed system that allows you to execute a certain number of operations per second based on the provisioned throughput you have configured.

item.title: Build a pipeline to join streams of real time data
item.description: With traditional architectures, it’s quite hard to counter challenges imposed by real-time streaming data – one such use case is joining streams of data from disparate sources.
